name: Mirelia Structured Data Marketplace
description: USPTO patent MCP server for competitive intelligence, prior art search, and R&D scouting. AI-enriched JSON (biz_value_prop, attr_tech_stack, importance_p). 3000+ patents in CPC G/H. Pay-per-patent via x402 on Polygon, Base, or Oasis.

tools.name: search_single_patents
tools.description: USPTO patent search for competitive intelligence and prior art. Filter by CPC (G06, H04, etc.) and keywords. Returns importance_p and biz_target_ind.

tools.name: purchase_single_patent
tools.description: Buy one USPTO patent dataset ($0.50 on-chain) with x402-style payment payloads. Full structured JSON delivery.

tools.name: search_packages
tools.description: Browse bulk USPTO patent packages (10/100/1000) for competitive intelligence and landscape analysis.

tools.name: verify_crypto_payment_and_deliver
tools.description: Purchase and deliver bulk USPTO patent packages after on-chain USDC/ROSE payment verification.
